description: Reinforces Gate 1 (read-after-write) and Gate 3 (read-before-write / never-fabricate-ids) for the management-portal MCP. Fires around management-portal write tools to remind the agent to ground in reads and verify by reading the record back.

hooks.command: echo '[portal-discipline] About to WRITE to the management-portal. Gate 3: every id must come from a list_*/get_* read or a create_* response — never fabricated. Ground in what the portal actually contains before writing.' 1>&2

echo '[portal-discipline] Gate 1 read-after-write: call the matching get_*/list_* tool now and confirm the specific field persisted. Trust the data effect, not the success string or a stale schema (e.g. create_flow_connection -> list_flow_connections; the edge may land even on a reported timeout).' 1>&2
